title: Delicate Korean-Style Steamed Pork Belly Banchan
description: A simple and flavorful side dish originating from Korea, featuring tender steamed pork belly served with a delicate sauce.
instructions: 1. Cut the pork belly into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a small saucepan, combine soy sauce, ginger, garlic, brown sugar, and chili flakes (if using).
3. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
4. Meanwhile, steam the pork belly pieces for 10-12 minutes, or until tender.
5. Remove the pork from the steamer and brush with the soy sauce mixture.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature as a side dish.
